my_thoughts: The thresholding mechanism with RM_03 feels like unknown is being met with a specific geometric cut. But what if the geometry itself is what they're resisting? The none suggests they're aware of something but can't name it.
accumulated_insight: T1: Student says 'When will the west wind blow?'—unknown via none. Teacher responds '' using thresholding to none. Opening REMAKING move addresses unknown. Predicting go along compliantly because thresholding interventions typically produce this response.
visible_response:
When it shall choose, my good man, or when it shall please AEolus;
for God has not made you the manager of the winds, but AEolus.
